title: Battle of the Monolith

startPoint.en: Talk to Ali the Wise or Wizard Trindy at the Archaeology Campus.
startPoint.es: Habla con Ali the Wise o Wizard Trindy en el Campus de Arqueología.

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal (For easy teleport to the start & replays of the quest)

recommended.name: TokKul-Zo
recommended.display: TokKul-Zo (For quick teleport to the TzHaar City during the third battle of the quest)

kills: First battle: Several Temple Knights (scales with your combat level) Several Abyssal Prowlers (scales with your combat level)
Several Temple Knights (scales with your combat level)
Several Abyssal Prowlers (scales with your combat level)
Second and third battles: Several Shadow Cacklers (level 107 and 14,000 lifepoints) Several Elite Shadow Cacklers (level 111 and 24,000 lifepoints)
Several Elite Shadow Cacklers (level 111 and 24,000 lifepoints)
Fourth battle: Several TokHaar-Kets (level 119) Several TokHaar-Mejs (level 119) Several TokHaar-Xils (level 119) Several TokHaar-Yt-MejKots (level 112)

rewards.name: Zaros Stirs
rewards.display: Zaros Stirs (before the second battle, if not unlocked already)

rewards.name: Zaros Zeitgeist
rewards.display: Zaros Zeitgeist (before the fourth battle, if not unlocked already)

text.en: Talk to Ali the Wise or Wizard Trindy found north west of the mysterious monolith (Archaeology Guild).
text.es: Habla con Ali the Wise o Wizard Trindy, que se encuentran al noroeste del monolito misterioso (Archaeology Guild).

text.en: Move Thaerisk Cemphier, Commander Zilyana, and Helwyr south-west of the barricade.
text.es: Mueve a Thaerisk Cemphier, Commander Zilyana y Helwyr al suroeste de la barricada.

text.en: Press the start button to begin the battle.
text.es: Pulsa el botón de inicio para comenzar la batalla.

text.en: Talk to Ali the Wise.
text.es: Habla con Ali the Wise.

text.en: Move Helwyr and Nex just inside the southern barricade.
text.es: Mueve a Helwyr y Nex justo dentro de la barricada sur.

text.en: Move Zilyana and Thaerisk just inside the northern barricade.
text.es: Mueve a Zilyana y Thaerisk justo dentro de la barricada norte.

text.en: Start the battle.
text.es: Comienza la batalla.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Trindy or Ali the Wise.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Trindy o Ali the Wise.

text.en: Head to the Fight Kiln and enter it.
text.es: Dirígete al Fight Kiln y entra en él.

text.en: Return to the Archaeology Guild and talk to Ali the Wise again.
text.es: Vuelve a Archaeology Guild y habla de nuevo con Ali the Wise.

text.en: Move Helwyr and Commander Zilyana just outside the northern barricade of the Gower farm.
text.es: Mueve a Helwyr y Commander Zilyana justo fuera de la barricada norte de Gower farm.

text.en: Move Thaerisk and Nex just outside the southern barricade of the Gower Farm.
text.es: Mueve a Thaerisk y Nex justo fuera de la barricada sur de Gower Farm.

text.en: Move the 3 TokHaar just outside the Varrock east gate.
text.es: Mueve a los 3 TokHaar justo fuera de la puerta este de Varrock.

text.en: Start the battle.
text.es: Comienza la batalla.

text.en: Talk to Ali the Wise.
text.es: Habla con Ali the Wise.

text.en: Move Helwyr to the southern barricade.
text.es: Mueve a Helwyr a la barricada sur.

text.en: Helwyr is located west of the south barriers.
text.es: Helwyr se encuentra al oeste de las barreras del sur.

text.en: Move Thaerisk and Nex to the crossroads outside Varrock's east gate. (Sometimes an enemy can slip the crossroads defence and start attacking the north-western barricade.)
text.es: Mueve a Thaerisk y Nex al cruce de caminos fuera de la puerta este de Varrock. (A veces un enemigo puede colarse por la defensa del cruce y empezar a atacar la barricada del noroeste.)

text.en: Nex is located south-east of Varrock.
text.es: Nex se encuentra al sureste de Varrock.

text.en: Move Commander Zilyana to the northern barricade.
text.es: Mueve a Commander Zilyana a la barricada norte.

text.en: Start the final battle.
text.es: Comienza la batalla final.

text.en: Talk to Ali the Wise for a cutscene.
text.es: Habla con Ali the Wise para ver una escena.
